name: Okra Soup
intro: Trim the tops and tails of the okra and roughly chop the pods. Place the okra in a food blender with the scotch bonnet chilli and pulse/blend until broken down, with a few small lumps remaining.

ingredients.item: large red bell pepper (deseeded and finely chopped)
pre-cooked meat alternative of your choice (such as seitan, roasted tofu or mushrooms)

method: Heat the palm oil in a pot, add the chopped onions and red bell pepper and sauté for 2-3 minutes. If making it oil-free, simply sauté the onions and pepper in 4 tablespoons of water until they start to soften and caramelise. Add the blended okra mixture, meat alternative and season with salt to taste. Cook for 5 minutes on high heat.
Serve hot with a swallow of your choice, such as eba or fufu.
